# Style Reference Guide

<!-- Generated by design-style-agent -->
<!-- Project: BetterBond Commission Payments POC — MortgageMax branding -->
<!-- Light mode only. No dark mode toggle is required (NFR3). -->

---

## Brand Overview

MortgageMax is a South African mortgage originator. The UI serves payment administrators working with financial data on desktop, so the design should feel professional, data-dense, and trustworthy — not consumer-facing. Prioritise legibility and quick scan-ability over visual flair.

**Primary color:** Navy `#1A3A6E` — use for the navigation bar, primary action buttons, active state indicators, and the page header.

**Accent color:** Teal `#0D9488` — use for chart series, status badges, decorative borders, focus rings inside the nav bar, and secondary highlights. Do not use teal-600 as a button background with white text (contrast = 3.74:1, fails WCAG AA for normal text). Use teal-700 `#0F766E` (the `--secondary` token) for any teal interactive element that carries white text.

---

## Typography

### Fonts
Use the system font stack via Geist Sans (`var(--font-geist-sans)`) already configured in the template. No custom web font import is needed.

### Heading hierarchy
- **h1** — Page title only (one per page). Example: "Dashboard", "Payment Management", "Payments Made". Use `text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground`. Do not use h1 inside cards or table sections.
- **h2** — Section title inside a page (e.g., "Payment Status", "Parked Payments Aging"). Use `text-lg font-semibold text-foreground`.
- **h3** — Card or panel sub-title. Use `text-base font-medium text-foreground`.
- **No decorative display headings** — this is a data application, not a marketing page.

### Body text
- Default body: `text-sm text-foreground` (14px). Use for table cell content, form labels, and general copy.
- Supporting/meta text: `text-sm text-muted-foreground`. Use for column headers in tables, helper text, timestamps, and non-critical labels.
- Caption/badge text: `text-xs`. Use inside status badges and pagination labels.

### Number formatting
Currency values must be displayed as `R 1,234,567.89` (US-style separators, "R" prefix, not en-ZA locale). Use a shared `formatCurrency(value: number): string` utility. Apply `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` (Tailwind: `tabular-nums`) to all currency and count columns in tables so amounts align when scanning vertically.

---

## Spacing

### Scale preferences
Use Tailwind's default spacing scale (multiples of 4px base). The following spacings are preferred for this application:

| Context | Value | Tailwind class |
|---|---|---|
| Card internal padding | 24px | `p-6` |
| Card header padding | 16px bottom | `pb-4` |
| Section gap between cards | 24px | `gap-6` |
| Table row height | implicit — default `py-3 px-4` per cell | `py-3 px-4` |
| Form field vertical gap | 16px | `space-y-4` |
| Button group horizontal gap | 8px | `gap-2` |
| Page top padding | 24px | `pt-6` |
| Page horizontal padding | 24px | `px-6` |

### Page layout
- Max content width: `max-w-7xl mx-auto` (1280px). Content should not stretch wider on large displays.
- Grid layout: use a 12-column grid (`grid grid-cols-12 gap-6`) for dashboard metric cards. Metric cards span 4 columns each on desktop (`col-span-4`), full width on mobile (`col-span-12`).

---

## Component Selection

Use Shadcn UI components exclusively. Do not write custom Shadcn-style components. Install via MCP if a component is not yet in the project.

### Specific guidance

| Situation | Component to use |
|---|---|
| Metric summary (count, total) | `<Card>` with `<CardHeader>` / `<CardContent>` |
| Data grid / table | `<Table>` with `<TableHeader>`, `<TableBody>`, `<TableRow>`, `<TableCell>` |
| Agency filter dropdown | `<Select>` (Shadcn) — not a native `<select>` |
| Row checkboxes | `<Checkbox>` (Shadcn) |
| Bulk action buttons (Park, Unpark) | `<Button variant="outline">` when disabled, `<Button variant="default">` (primary/navy) when enabled |
| Initiate Payments button | `<Button variant="default">` (primary/navy) — disabled state via `disabled` prop |
| Download PDF button | `<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">` with a download icon |
| Toast notifications | `<Sonner>` / `toast()` from Shadcn sonner — auto-dismiss 5 seconds |
| Pagination (prev/next) | `<Button variant="outline" size="sm">` — do not use a Pagination component; simple prev/next with page indicator is sufficient |
| Loading skeleton | `<Skeleton>` for metric cards and table rows during API fetch |
| Error state | Inline `<Alert variant="destructive">` for page-level errors; toast for mutation errors |
| Sign-in form | `<Card>` containing a `<Form>` with `<Input>` and `<Button>` — centered on page |
| Status badge (REG, MAN-PAY, PARKED) | `<Badge>` with color variant mapping (see Status Badges below) |

### Status Badges
Map `StatusCode` values to Shadcn `<Badge>` class overrides:

| StatusCode | Display text | Style |
|---|---|---|
| `REG` | Ready to Pay | `bg-primary text-primary-foreground` (navy) |
| `MAN-PAY` | Manually Paid | `bg-muted text-muted-foreground` (grey) |
| `PARKED` | Parked | `bg-[oklch(0.666_0.157_58.3)] text-white` (amber) — inline style or custom class |
| Batch statuses | Use label as-is | `<Badge variant="outline">` |

### Do not use
- `<Dialog>` for confirmations — the FRS explicitly states no confirmation dialog for Reset Demo Data (BR10). Do not add one.
- `<Tabs>` for switching between Dashboard grids — both grids are always visible simultaneously, filtered by the shared dropdown.
- `<Sheet>` or slide-over panels — not in scope.

---

## Layout

### Navigation bar
- Full-width top nav bar with navy background (`bg-primary`).
- MortgageMax logo (`documentation/morgagemaxlogo.png`) on the left — use an `<Image>` tag (Next.js) with `height={36}` and appropriate `alt="MortgageMax"`.
- Navigation links centered or right-aligned: Dashboard, Payment Management, Payments Made.
- Active link: `text-secondary` (teal-600) with an underline or bottom border indicator (`border-b-2 border-secondary`).
- Inactive link: `text-primary-foreground` (white) with hover state `hover:text-secondary`.
- No hamburger menu required at desktop. On mobile (< 768px): collapse links into a `<Sheet>`-based drawer or a simple stacked vertical nav — keep accessible.

### Page structure
```
<nav>  [full-width navy top bar]
<main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pt-6 pb-12">
  <h1>  [page title]
  [page content]
</main>
```

### Dashboard layout
1. Three metric cards in a row: "Ready to Pay", "Payments Made (Last 14 Days)", "Parked Payments".
2. Agency filter dropdown (full width or right-aligned, above both grids).
3. "Payment Status" grid (`<Table>`).
4. "Parked Payments Aging" grid (`<Table>`).

### Payment Management layout
1. Filter row: AgencyName `<Select>` (left) + Park / Unpark / Initiate Payments buttons (right). Buttons right-aligned, gap-2.
2. Full-width `<Table>` with checkboxes.
3. Pagination controls below the table.

### Payments Made layout
1. "Reset Demo Data" `<Button variant="destructive">` — right-aligned above the list.
2. Full-width table/card list of batches.
3. Pagination controls below.

---

## Motion and Animation

- Use the existing `slideInFromRight` keyframe (defined in `globals.css`) for toast/notification entrance — do not redefine.
- Use the existing `modalEnter` / `modalExit` keyframes for any dialog transitions.
- All other transitions should be `transition-colors duration-150` or `transition-opacity duration-200` — brief and functional.
- Do not add bounce, scale-up, or decorative motion on data tables or metric cards.
- Reduced-motion: `globals.css` already includes `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` that clamps all animations to 0.01ms. Honour it — do not override with `!important` animation durations on individual components.

---

## Accessibility

- **Minimum contrast:** All text on backgrounds must meet WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text / UI components). Confirmed pairs:
  - White on navy: 11.20:1 (AAA)
  - Navy on white: 11.20:1 (AAA)
  - Navy on near-white page: 10.71:1 (AAA)
  - White on teal-700: 5.47:1 (AA)
  - Mid-grey on white (muted text): 4.76:1 (AA)
- **Focus rings:** All interactive elements receive the navy focus ring (`outline-ring/50` via `globals.css` base layer). Do not suppress outlines with `outline-none` without a replacement visible focus indicator.
- **Checkboxes:** Each row checkbox must have an `aria-label` including the payment Reference (e.g., `aria-label="Select payment REF-001"`). The header "select all" checkbox must have `aria-label="Select all payments on this page"`.
- **Buttons with icon-only content:** Any button that renders only an icon (e.g., "Download PDF" with just an icon) must have an `aria-label` or a visually-hidden `<span>` with the button text.
- **Table headers:** Use `<TableHead scope="col">` on all column headers for screen reader row/column association.
- **Toasts:** Toasts must use `role="status"` (for non-critical success messages) or `role="alert"` (for errors) — Shadcn Sonner handles this automatically. Do not suppress announcements.
- **Keyboard navigation:** The agency filter dropdown must be operable via keyboard (Shadcn `<Select>` handles this). Pagination buttons must be reachable via Tab. Table checkboxes must be toggleable with Space.
- **Disabled buttons:** Use the `disabled` attribute (not just `aria-disabled`) so the browser prevents all interaction. Shadcn `<Button disabled>` sets this automatically.

---

## Brand Tone

### Microcopy style
- **Formal but clear** — this is a financial operations tool. Avoid casual language ("Oops!"), but also avoid jargon-heavy language.
- Sentence case for all labels and button text (not ALL CAPS, not Title Case For Every Word).
- Examples: "Park selected", "Unpark selected", "Initiate payments", "Download PDF", "Reset demo data".

### Error messages
Use the exact toast messages specified in the FRS — do not paraphrase:
- `"Failed to load dashboard data. Please try again."`
- `"Failed to park payments. Please try again."`
- `"Failed to unpark payments. Please try again."`
- `"Failed to initiate payment batch. Please try again."`
- `"Failed to download PDF. Please try again."`
- `"Failed to reset demo data. Please try again."`

Success toasts:
- `"Payment batch created successfully."`
- `"Demo data has been reset."`

### Empty states
- Payment Management grid: `"No payments ready for processing."` — centered in the table body, `text-muted-foreground text-sm`.
- Payments Made batch list: `"No payment batches found."` — same styling.

### Button labels (exact)
| Action | Label |
|---|---|
| Bulk park selected payments | "Park" |
| Bulk unpark selected payments | "Unpark" |
| Initiate payment batch for selected agency | "Initiate Payments" |
| Download batch invoice | "Download PDF" |
| Reset demo data | "Reset Demo Data" |

### Number / date formatting
- Currency: `R 1,234,567.89` — implement via `Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })` and prepend `"R "`. Do not use `en-ZA` locale (which uses space as thousand separator and comma as decimal).
- Dates: Display as `DD MMM YYYY` (e.g., "12 May 2026") using `Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-ZA', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })` — date display (not currency) may use en-ZA locale.
- Percentages: Not displayed — `CommissionPercent` is excluded from the UI per R7.
